FeelBeforeNotes: Feeling good, happy, moving well, ready to go
FeelAfterNotes: Was moving well, preparation was soft and controlled. Actions were correct for the most part, finish sometimes messy
MentalGameNotes: Good focus when needed, good planning. Somewhat easily unsettled but able to bring it back in most cases
WorkedWell: Moving well. 4m fast attack worked well when used sparingly. Pull off controlled prep very good and can be paired with parry
DidntWork: Long attack very hesitant. Defence a little rushed which resulted in poor execution
